arts.ttl: Approach made to end player’s stay at Southampton – West Ham to have say in transfer
arts.sum: Last summer deadline day, West Ham United allowed Maxwel Cornet to join Southampton on a season-long loan deal. Julen Lopetegui, who was shown the exit door at West Ham earlier this month, left the winger out of his plans. arts.sum: According to a report from L’Équipe, RC Lens are considering a move to bring West Ham United’s Maxwel Cornet (28) back to France. Cornet left Ligue 1 four years ago…

arts.ttl: Galatasaray trying to snatch signing from West Ham – Hammers look to have big advantage
arts.sum: Galatasaray have joined West Ham United in the race to sign Marseille’s Elye Wahi in the winter market, according to L’Equipe. Last week, we covered claims from France that the Hammers have firm interest in the 22-year-old. Earlier on Tuesday, L’Equipe stated West Ham have contacted the Ligue 1 side to advance for a loan The post Galatasaray trying to snatch signing from West Ham – Hammers look to have big advantage appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that West Ham Untied are showing interest in Galatasaray forward Michy Batshuayi. The Hammers are in desperate need of a centre forward in this transfer window due to the long-term absences of Niclas Füllkrug and Michail Antonio.
